cards.title: Startup, Resume, and Recovery Shell

fields.Current note: Refined in `1f62d11` after operator feedback. Actual app smoke pass: first screen now shows Open Existing Job, Start New Job, and recovery only when interrupted state exists; Existing Job routes through a picker into Setup Mode; New Job now includes save folder and PTGui template selection. `swift build` passed.
fields.Next action: Operator visual signoff on revised startup/new-job flow, then verify archive/ignore recovery once a real crash state is present.

cards.summary: Refined in `1f62d11` after operator feedback. Actual app smoke pass: first screen now shows Open Existing Job, Start New Job, and recovery only when interrupted state exists; Existing Job routes through a picker into Setup Mode; New Job now includes save folder and PTGui template selection. `swift build` passed. Operator visual signoff on revised startup/new-job flow, then verify archive/ignore recovery once a real crash state is present.

cards.title: Setup Mode and Working Mode Gate

fields.Current note: Implemented in `35cf7cb`; app smoke-verified 2026-05-30. Existing job opens Setup Mode, warning acknowledgement is shown for non-green readiness, and Enter Working Mode launches the Operator Console on existing-footage playback.
fields.Next action: Operator signoff on visual treatment across all active windows; then use as dependency for Operator Console and mapping work.

cards.summary: Implemented in `35cf7cb`; app smoke-verified 2026-05-30. Existing job opens Setup Mode, warning acknowledgement is shown for non-green readiness, and Enter Working Mode launches the Operator Console on existing-footage playback. Operator signoff on visual treatment across all active windows; then use as dependency for Operator Console and mapping work.

cards.title: Operator Console Readiness Dashboard

fields.Current note: Initial OC shell implemented in `1994477`; `swift build` passed and actual app smoke pass rendered the OC. Adds Operator Console terminology, Working Mode/source/alarm header pills, module tabs, job/project context, readiness cards with green/yellow states, embedded previews, source telemetry, and existing REC controls.
fields.Next action: Operator/design review for layout clarity and module terminology before deeper OC modules are accepted.

cards.summary: Initial OC shell implemented in `1994477`; `swift build` passed and actual app smoke pass rendered the OC. Adds Operator Console terminology, Working Mode/source/alarm header pills, module tabs, job/project context, readiness cards with green/yellow states, embedded previews, source telemetry, and existing REC controls. Operator/design review for layout clarity and module terminology before deeper OC modules are accepted.

cards.title: Default PTGui Template and Active Calibration Lifecycle

fields.Current note: Core artifact path app-verified 2026-05-30. Launch copied active PTGui to `_CALIBRATION/calibration_1bb8cd94.pts`; `manifest.json` records project-local template path and SHA-256; fresh `take_007` sidecar records project-level and take-level `calibrationTemplate`.
fields.Next action: Operator test import/replace in Setup Mode and between takes, plus disabled-during-recording lock.

cards.summary: Core artifact path app-verified 2026-05-30. Launch copied active PTGui to `_CALIBRATION/calibration_1bb8cd94.pts`; `manifest.json` records project-local template path and SHA-256; fresh `take_007` sidecar records project-level and take-level `calibrationTemplate`. Operator test import/replace in Setup Mode and between takes, plus disabled-during-recording lock.

cards.title: 9-Grid and PTGui Mapping Verification

fields.Current note: Initial mapping module implemented in `a41c49d`; `swift build` passed and actual app smoke pass rendered the Cameras tab. It shows SDI/playback source, 9-grid cell, OCR ID, Pinwheel position, PTGui slot, expected Live Stitch ID, status, standard-template indicator, and side-by-side 9-grid/stitch previews. Job/manifest now persist the template mapping override state.
fields.Next action: Operator/hardware review on the live array, then add the advanced override editing flow if a nonstandard PTGui template is encountered.

cards.summary: Initial mapping module implemented in `a41c49d`; `swift build` passed and actual app smoke pass rendered the Cameras tab. It shows SDI/playback source, 9-grid cell, OCR ID, Pinwheel position, PTGui slot, expected Live Stitch ID, status, standard-template indicator, and side-by-side 9-grid/stitch previews. Job/manifest now persist the template mapping override state. Operator/hardware review on the live array, then add the advanced override editing flow if a nonstandard PTGui template is encountered.

cards.title: ROI Profile Store and Overlay Verification Roll

fields.Current note: Initial shell landed in `ae1bc2e`; close-loop landed in `9cefa66`. Overlay/QC now has context-keyed ROI fallback, fast/full verification actions, VisualAnalyzer ROI injection, repo-local DB resolution, 9/9 REC observation, majority roll/clip advance observation, and pass-state persistence. `swift build` passed; app smoke pass verified startup through Overlay/QC on existing footage.
fields.Next action: Live-array verification: confirm Fast Test passes after a forced roll/clip advance, Full Test requires stop after REC, and stale/missing ROI stays yellow/non-blocking.

cards.summary: Initial shell landed in `ae1bc2e`; close-loop landed in `9cefa66`. Overlay/QC now has context-keyed ROI fallback, fast/full verification actions, VisualAnalyzer ROI injection, repo-local DB resolution, 9/9 REC observation, majority roll/clip advance observation, and pass-state persistence. `swift build` passed; app smoke pass verified startup through Overlay/QC on existing footage. Live-array verification: confirm Fast Test passes after a forced roll/clip advance, Full Test requires stop after REC, and stale/missing ROI stays yellow/non-blocking.

cards.title: 500 ms REC Consensus and Recording Classification

fields.Current note: Implemented in `feee6fa` after the 500 ms tolerance change in `9cefa66`. Partial REC states that persist past 500 ms now start recording before posting per-camera CAMERA_FAILED_TO_RECORD or CAMERA_RECORDED_ALONE events, so 8/9, 1/9, and middle partial patterns can produce take artifacts with sidecar QC flags instead of only UI alarms. `swift build` passed.
fields.Next action: Live-array verification across 9/9, 8/9, 1/9, and 5/4 split patterns; confirm event log, sidecar flags, Operator Console REC state, and folder sorting remain coherent.

cards.summary: Implemented in `feee6fa` after the 500 ms tolerance change in `9cefa66`. Partial REC states that persist past 500 ms now start recording before posting per-camera CAMERA_FAILED_TO_RECORD or CAMERA_RECORDED_ALONE events, so 8/9, 1/9, and middle partial patterns can produce take artifacts with sidecar QC flags instead of only UI alarms. `swift build` passed. Live-array verification across 9/9, 8/9, 1/9, and 5/4 split patterns; confirm event log, sidecar flags, Operator Console REC state, and folder sorting remain coherent.

cards.title: Authoritative Roll/Clip OCR Take Identity

fields.Why ready: Card 7 now creates take artifacts for partial REC states, so the next stability risk is making OCR-derived roll/clip identity authoritative and operator-visible.
fields.Definition of done: Make roll/clip OCR drive production take identity with majority consensus, detect unreadable/mismatched OCR as a serious non-blocking warning, and expose a clear Verify Clip Sync action/report in the Operator Console.

cards.summary: Make roll/clip OCR drive production take identity with majority consensus, detect unreadable/mismatched OCR as a serious non-blocking warning, and expose a clear Verify Clip Sync action/report in the Operator Console.

suggested_next_pulls: Start card 8: make roll/clip OCR the authoritative production take identity and expose clip-sync verification.
Get operator/hardware signoff on cards 5, 6, and 7 with the physical array connected.
Complete remaining card 4 operator tests: import/replace in Setup Mode and between takes, plus disabled-during-recording lock.
Get operator/design review on card 3's Operator Console shell while card 6 is being wired.
Keep card 25 in view; if REC/OCR work stalls, pull the analyzer harness forward before deeper UI work.
acceptance_gates: Setup Mode and Working Mode are explicit and visually distinct.
Default PTGui template loads for every job and active template is recorded.
Mapping and ROI/overlay verification are usable in Setup Mode.
REC consensus uses 500 ms and classifies 9/9, 8/9, 1/9, and middle partial patterns.
Roll/clip OCR drives production take identity.
Take sidecars and manifest update after every closed Working Mode take.
9-grid and Live Stitch recording health are visible and independent.
Degraded/non-certified TC status is visible and persisted.
